summary: Admin Panel Mobile Responsive Layout Testing Complete - All tested tabs (Manager, Vouchers, Payments, Analytics, Game Settings) display correctly on mobile with card-based layouts. Bottom navigation with Schnellzugriff modal working properly.

admin_mobile_navigation.details: Mobile menu button (data-testid='admin-mobile-menu-btn') works correctly. Opens grid of all admin tabs.

admin_bottom_nav.details: Bottom navigation bar visible with Dashboard, Suchen, Auktionen, Mehr tabs and center purple '+' button

schnellzugriff_modal.details: Center '+' button opens Schnellzugriff modal with quick access to: Auktionen, Benutzer, Produkte, Gutscheine, Zahlungen, Analytics, Bots, Influencer, Großkunden, Manager, Mitarbeiter, Spiele

manager_tab_mobile.details: Manager tab shows mobile card view (md:hidden) with: Name, Email, Status (Aktiv/Inaktiv), Cities tags, Stats grid (Influencer count, Inf. Prov., Manager 15%), Details and Ban buttons

vouchers_tab_mobile.details: Gutscheine tab shows mobile card view with: Voucher code (pink monospace), Status badge, Type (€ Euro/Gebote/Rabatt), Value, Usage count (0/1), Deaktivieren and Delete buttons

payments_tab_mobile.details: Zahlungsübersicht tab shows responsive layout with: Header with Aktualisieren button, Stats cards (Umsatz gesamt, Transaktionen, Gebote verkauft) in single column, Empty state message

analytics_tab_mobile.details: Analytics Dashboard shows responsive layout with: Period selector dropdown, KPI cards in 2-column grid (Umsatz, Bestellungen, Neue Nutzer, Aktive Nutzer), Charts (Umsatzentwicklung, Conversion Funnel)

game_settings_tab_mobile.details: Spieleinstellungen tab shows responsive card layout with: Header with Live indicator and Speichern button, Settings cards for Tägliche Belohnungen, Anfänger-Auktionen, Gratis-Auktionen, Nacht-Auktionen, Achievements, Freunde werben

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel mobile responsive layouts tested at 390x844 viewport (iPhone 14 Pro). All tabs use md:hidden for mobile card views and hidden md:block for desktop table views. Bottom navigation has Schnellzugriff modal accessible via center purple '+' button. Cookie consent banner needs to be dismissed first (data-testid='decline-cookies'). HappyHourBanner may intercept clicks - use force=True for click actions.
